---
title: "\'Preface- Arachne in her spectacles\'"
---

## \'Preface- Arachne in her spectacles\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1875
**Genre:** Fiction, didactic allegory
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (Christmas 1875) [v-vi]

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
